forecast.title: Expense Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Statistical expense prediction and anomaly detection
forecast.historicalAndPredicted: Historical data and predicted values with confidence interval
forecast.noData: No data available for the selected period.
forecast.errorLoading: Failed to load forecast data. Please try again.
forecast.noAnomalies: No anomalies detected in the selected period.
forecast.descDuplicateSuspect: Possible duplicate: similar amount to {otherInvoice} ({days}d apart)

forecastSettings.title: Forecast Settings
forecastSettings.description: Choose an algorithm and fine-tune forecast parameters
forecastSettings.autoDescription: The algorithm will be selected automatically based on data characteristics

auto.name: Automatic
auto.description: Automatically selects the best algorithm based on data availability

moving-average.name: Weighted Moving Average
moving-average.description: Weighted moving average — more weight on recent months. Best for stable, low-variance data.

windowSize.label: Window Size
windowSize.description: Number of recent months to consider

linear-regression.name: Linear Regression
linear-regression.description: OLS linear regression blended with moving average. Good for data with a clear linear trend.

blendRatio.label: Blend Ratio
blendRatio.description: Weight of regression vs moving average (1.0 = pure regression)

seasonal.name: Seasonal Decomposition
seasonal.description: Linear regression on deseasonalized data with seasonal index re-application. Requires 12+ months.

significanceThreshold.label: Significance Threshold
significanceThreshold.description: Minimum variance of seasonal indices to consider pattern significant

exponential-smoothing.name: Exponential Smoothing
exponential-smoothing.description: Simple or Holt's double exponential smoothing. Responsive to recent changes.

alpha.label: Alpha (level)
alpha.description: Level smoothing factor — higher = more reactive to recent data

beta.label: Beta (trend)
beta.description: Trend smoothing factor — 0 disables trend component (simple ES)

anomalySettings.title: Anomaly Detection Settings
anomalySettings.description: Enable/disable rules and adjust detection parameters

amount-spike.name: Amount Spike
amount-spike.description: Detects invoices with amounts significantly higher than the supplier average (Z-score).

new-supplier.name: New Supplier
new-supplier.description: Flags first-time invoices from previously unknown suppliers above a certain amount.

amountThreshold.label: Amount Threshold (PLN)
amountThreshold.description: Minimum gross amount to trigger alert

duplicate-suspect.name: Duplicate Suspect
duplicate-suspect.description: Identifies potential duplicate invoices — same supplier, similar amount, close dates.

category-shift.name: Category Shift
category-shift.description: Flags spending categories where recent total is significantly above the monthly average.

shiftThresholdPct.label: Shift Threshold (%)
shiftThresholdPct.description: Minimum percentage above average to flag

frequency-change.name: Frequency Change
frequency-change.description: Detects suppliers sending invoices much more frequently than their historical average.

frequencyMultiplier.label: Frequency Multiplier
frequencyMultiplier.description: Multiplier of expected invoice frequency to trigger

forecastComparison.title: A/B Algorithm Comparison
forecastComparison.description: Compare results of two forecast algorithms side by side
